response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is exclusively in web, mobile, and general software development with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack development experience across multiple languages and platforms
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated technical leadership
Extensive experience in performance-critical systems and DevOps tooling
concerns: No experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling
No evidence of deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture expertise
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience

key_factors.factor: Lack of AI accelerator hardware experience
No SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design background
Web/mobile focus vs. required infrastructure/hardware optimization
